title: Spanish Toast with Rich Mushrooms
description: A vegetarian twist on a classic toast recipe, featuring rich, earthy mushrooms in a light Spanish-inspired sauce.
instructions: Slice the mushrooms into thin pieces and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they release their moisture.
Add the sherry vinegar, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 10-12 minutes, until the mushrooms are tender.
Meanwhile, toast the bread until crispy.
Serve the mushrooms over the toasted bread.
Garnish with additional thyme, if desired.
